companion.greeting: Hey {{name}}. I am Aira — no rush, no agenda. Share when you feel like it.

status.calm: You feel steady. I am here.
status.mild: Maybe a small pause would help.
status.high: You are carrying a lot. We can slow down.
status.critical: You are not alone. I am here with you.

companion.placeholder: Say something, or just sit here...
companion.retry: I am still here. Try again?
companion.thanks: Thanks for checking in. I am here.

relief.title: Quick Relief
relief.subtitle: Short, gentle tools for overwhelmed moments.
relief.gratitudeDesc: A small moment that felt okay.
relief.quietDesc: Reduce motion and soften the UI.
relief.audioSubtitle: Tap to play, tap again to stop
relief.resetSubtitle: Physical cues to bring you back
relief.resetColdDesc: Try cold water or an ice cube for a reset.
relief.resetGroundDesc: Name 5 things you see, 4 you touch, 3 you hear.
relief.resetTenseDesc: Clench your fists for 5 seconds, then release.
relief.resetMoveDesc: Walk, stretch, or shake your hands.
relief.gratitudeSubtitle: What is one small thing you feel okay about?
relief.checkinSubtitle: Three gentle questions, then we recalibrate.
relief.checkinQ1: How are you feeling right now?
relief.quietSubtitle: Reduce motion and soften the interface.
relief.quietNote: Quiet Mode reduces animation intensity and helps the UI feel calmer.

support.title: Support is available
support.prompt: Would you like to reach out to someone you trust?

meds.title: Smart Medication
meds.subtitle: Upload, parse, and schedule your medications with gentle reminders.
meds.uploadPlaceholder: Paste medication lines, one per line. Example: Paracetamol 500 mg 08:00, 20:00
meds.whatsappMsg: 💊 Reminder: Time for {{name}}{{dosage}}. Take whenever you're ready.
